zh.Mortain, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankr: 法國巴-諾門迪曼其莫當
zh.Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandi: 法國巴-諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-
zh.lifeSummary: 當Denise Mortain於大約1060年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain30歲，母親Maud de Montgomery11058歲。她於大約1085年與Guy de Laval結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1090年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年31歲。

zh-hans.Mortain, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankr: 法国巴-諾門迪曼其莫當
zh-hans.Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandi: 法国巴-諾門迪奧內莫塔尼-奧-
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Denise Mortain于大约1060年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain30岁，母亲Maud de Montgomery11058岁。她于大约1085年与Guy de Laval结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1090年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mortain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Morten
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Denise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

variants.name: Denyse
meanings: feminine form of   Denis  , widely used in the English-speaking world since the 1920s.  See also  Dionysia .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Denise Mortain was born about 1060, in Cornwall, England, her father, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, was 30 and her mother, Maud de Montgomery, was 11058. She married Guy de Laval about 1085. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1090, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Denise Mortain est née environ 1060, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud de Montgomery, avait 11058 ans. Elle a épousé Guy de Laval environ 1085. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1090, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Denise Mortain um 1060 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain 30 und ihre Mutter Maud de Montgomery 11058. Sie hat um 1085 Guy de Laval geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1090 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Denise Mortain è nata il circa 1060 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Maud de Montgomery, aveva 11058 anni. Lei sposato Guy de Laval circa 1085. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1090, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.Mortain, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankr: フランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェモーティイン
ja.Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメ
ja.Laval, Mayenne, France: フランスメイエンラヴァル
ja.Mortagne-au-Perche, Orne, Basse-Normandi: フランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンモータグネ-アウ-ペルチェ
ja.lifeSummary: Denise Mortainが約1060年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Robert de Conteville Count of Mortainは30歳，母Maud de Montgomeryは11058歳であった。約1085年にGuy de Lavalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1090年にフランスピカーディソンメで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Denise Mortain(이)가 대략 1060년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Montgomery(은)는 11058세였다. 그녀는 대략 1085년 Guy de Laval(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1090년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Denise Mortain nasceu aproximadamente 1060, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Montgomery, tinha 11058 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy de Laval aproximadamente 1085. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1090, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Denise Mortain родилась около 1060 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Montgomery, 11058. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy de Laval около 1085 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1090 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Denise Mortain nació aproximadamente 1060, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Conteville Count of Mortain, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Maud de Montgomery, tenía 11058 años. Se casó con Guy de Laval aproximadamente 1085. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1090, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 31 años.
